compiled_state.title: Create KNOWN-ISSUES.md with 10 DSO incidents and smoke test
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Create .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md with 10 incident entries (exit 144, path confusion, test timeout, venv not found, review gate blocks, nesting errors, hook cascades, ticket conflicts, PLUGIN_ROOT unbound, cascading failures). Each entry: ID/Keywords/Symptom/Root cause/Detection/Fix. Write smoke test at tests/scripts/test-known-issues-smoke.sh first (RED). Add .test-index mapping.

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md exists - Verify: test -f .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md
- [ ] File contains 10 incident entries - Verify: grep -c '^### INC-' .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] Smoke test exists and is executable - Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-known-issues-smoke.sh
- [ ] Smoke test passes - Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-known-issues-smoke.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry exists - Verify: grep -q '.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md, tests/scripts/test-known-issues-smoke.sh, .test-index. Tests: 24 passed, 0 failed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Created .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md with 10 incident entries and smoke test
